products.short_description: The Asgard® Angle Head is used to perfectly feather the joint compound applied to both sides of internal corners in one pass. The Angle Head can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The Angle Head is generally used as part of the Taping process to wipe down the corner after the corne...
products.description_text: The Asgard® Angle Head is used to perfectly feather the joint compound applied to both sides of internal corners in one pass. The Angle Head can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The Angle Head is generally used as part of the Taping process to wipe down the corner after the corner roller (CR01-AD) is used to set the joint tape into the corner. When the Angle Head is used to wipe down the corners, attach it to the FH-AD or XH-AD support handles with the CFA-AD adapter (not included). Wipes down excess joint compound in internal corners Embeds joint tape in internal corners of walls and ceilings Finishes internal corners of walls and ceilings Features Stainless Steel Frames Patented, positive Ball Retainer EasyRoll Wheels Adjustable Springs
products.description_html:
The Asgard® Angle Head is used to perfectly feather the joint compound applied to both sides of internal corners in one pass. The Angle Head can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The Angle Head is generally used as part of the Taping process to wipe down the corner after the corner roller (CR01-AD) is used to set the joint tape into the corner. When the Angle Head is used to wipe down the corners, attach it to the FH-AD or XH-AD support handles with the CFA-AD adapter (not included).

products.catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Automatic Taping Tools
products.short_description: The Asgard Classic Finishing Box Combo includes the tools you need to start finishing flat joints quickly and professionally. The adjustable length handle provides flexibility for multiple ceiling heights
products.description_text: The Asgard Classic Finishing Box Combo includes the tools you need to start finishing flat joints quickly and professionally. The adjustable length handle provides flexibility for multiple ceiling heights 10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (EZ10-AD) (EZ12-AD) The Asgard® Classic Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows you to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the gypsum board on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. Loading Pump and Filler Adapter (LP01-AD) (FA01-AD) The Asgard® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. It is used together with the GN01-TT Gooseneck and FA01-AD Filler Adapter to fill the Automatic Taper, Finishing Boxes, Corner Applicator and Nail Spotter with joint compound. The LP01-AD features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The twist-lock foot valve provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. Unlike loading pumps from other brands the Asgard LP01-AD does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets. Fills Automatic Tapers (with GN01-TT Gooseneck) Fills finishing boxes, corner applicator and nail spotter (with FA01-AD filler adapter) Brakeless Box Extendable Handle - 38” - 60 (BBHE-AD) Asgard® introduces the first full-length brakeless finishing box handle. The friction brake design eliminates the learning curve associated with standard finishing box handles and makes it easy to achieve professional results within minutes of starting to work with automatic taping and finishing tools. The ergonomic knob makes it easy to adjust the amount of friction.
products.description_html:
The Asgard Classic Finishing Box Combo includes the tools you need to start finishing flat joints quickly and professionally. The adjustable length handle provides flexibility for multiple ceiling heights

10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (EZ10-AD) (EZ12-AD)

The Asgard® Classic Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows you to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the gypsum board on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint.

Loading Pump and Filler Adapter (LP01-AD) (FA01-AD)

The Asgard® Loading Pump combines reliability with innovation. It is used together with the GN01-TT Gooseneck and FA01-AD Filler Adapter to fill the Automatic Taper, Finishing Boxes, Corner Applicator and Nail Spotter with joint compound. The LP01-AD features the slim tube design preferred by professional finishers and robust construction for dependable performance and long life. The twist-lock foot valve provides secure attachment and easy removal for cleaning and maintenance. Unlike loading pumps from other brands the Asgard LP01-AD does not require a paper gasket for the filler adapter or gooseneck due to an innovative, integrated O-Ring that provides a terrific seal with fewer headaches from lost, worn or damaged paper gaskets.

  • Fills Automatic Tapers (with GN01-TT Gooseneck)
  • Fills finishing boxes, corner applicator and nail spotter (with FA01-AD filler adapter)

Brakeless Box Extendable Handle - 38” - 60 (BBHE-AD)

Asgard® introduces the first full-length brakeless finishing box handle. The friction brake design eliminates the learning curve associated with standard finishing box handles and makes it easy to achieve professional results within minutes of starting to work with automatic taping and finishing tools. The ergonomic knob makes it easy to adjust the amount of friction.

products.description_text: The Asgard® MAXXBOX® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The MAXXBOX® Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows you to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the gypsum board on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. Asgard® MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat over the joint tape. The Asgard 10” MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 60% more usable joint compound than the standard Classic finishing box (model EZ10-AD) and up to 36% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. products.catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Automatic Taping Tools
products.short_description: The Asgard® Nail Spotter is used to fill the depressions left from the nails or screw heads during installation of the drywall. The Nail Spotter features an easy clean box design that removes excess compound at the same time as filling the depressions. The hardened steel skid plate allows the Nail Spotter to move al...
products.description_text: The Asgard® Nail Spotter is used to fill the depressions left from the nails or screw heads during installation of the drywall. The Nail Spotter features an easy clean box design that removes excess compound at the same time as filling the depressions. The hardened steel skid plate allows the Nail Spotter to move along the wall smoothly while protecting the stainless steel blade from nail or screw heads that were not fully set below the surface of the drywall. The NS01-AD Nail Spotter attaches to the XH-AD extension handle or FH-AD fiberglass handle (sold separately). The Nail Spotter is also used to quickly identify fasteners that were not properly set during the installation of the gypsum board. Before starting to apply joint tape, run the Nail Spotter over all the fasteners (walls and ceilings). If you hear a “click”, the fastener should be set deeper to avoid damage to the other tools. You can also use the Nail Spotter to apply joint compound to the outside edges of internal corners. This is a quick and efficient way to clean up any edges that may have been left by the Angle Heads due to corners that are slightly out of square. Fills depressions left from the heads of nails or screws in drywall Removes excess joint compound after filling dimples Quickly identifies improperly set fasteners Features Weight - 1.50 lb(s) Easy Clean Design Stainless Steel construction Skid Design extends blade life over wheel designs
products.description_html:
The Asgard® Nail Spotter is used to fill the depressions left from the nails or screw heads during installation of the drywall. The Nail Spotter features an easy clean box design that removes excess compound at the same time as filling the depressions. The hardened steel skid plate allows the Nail Spotter to move along the wall smoothly while protecting the stainless steel blade from nail or screw heads that were not fully set below the surface of the drywall. The NS01-AD Nail Spotter attaches to the XH-AD extension handle or FH-AD fiberglass handle (sold separately). The Nail Spotter is also used to quickly identify fasteners that were not properly set during the installation of the gypsum board. Before starting to apply joint tape, run the Nail Spotter over all the fasteners (walls and ceilings). If you hear a “click”, the fastener should be set deeper to avoid damage to the other tools. You can also use the Nail Spotter to apply joint compound to the outside edges of internal corners. This is a quick and efficient way to clean up any edges that may have been left by the Angle Heads due to corners that are slightly out of square.

  • Fills depressions left from the heads of nails or screws in drywall
  • Removes excess joint compound after filling dimples
  • Quickly identifies improperly set fasteners

Features

  • Weight - 1.50 lb(s)
  • Easy Clean Design
  • Stainless Steel construction
  • Skid Design extends blade life over wheel designs

products.product_name: Asgard Power Assist MAXXBOX Finishing Box
products.short_description: The Asgard® Power Assist® Finishing Box requires 50% less effort to automatically dispense the proper amount of joint compound and feather the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. Simply place the blade on the joint first then apply the wheels to activate the Power Assist mechanism. The Power Assist® fi...
products.description_text: The Asgard® Power Assist® Finishing Box requires 50% less effort to automatically dispense the proper amount of joint compound and feather the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. Simply place the blade on the joint first then apply the wheels to activate the Power Assist mechanism. The Power Assist® finishing boxes from Asgard® provide the extra capacity you want with half the effort required from other high-capacity finishing boxes. The adjustable crown setting dial allows you to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first embedding application to the second or third finishing coat. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the gypsum board on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints Features Reverse Springs for power-assisted finishing EasyClean Pressure Plate Anodized Aluminum Box Adjustable Crown Control Solid Brass Blade Holder Pivoting Axle
products.description_html:
The Asgard® Power Assist® Finishing Box requires 50% less effort to automatically dispense the proper amount of joint compound and feather the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. Simply place the blade on the joint first then apply the wheels to activate the Power Assist mechanism. The Power Assist® finishing boxes from Asgard® provide the extra capacity you want with half the effort required from other high-capacity finishing boxes. The adjustable crown setting dial allows you to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first embedding application to the second or third finishing coat. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the gypsum board on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint.

Model AT01-AD features stainless steel side plates plus a hard anodized push rod and cable drum to prevent cor...
products.description_text: The Asgard® “HAMMER™” Automatic Taper redefines Value. The Taper simultaneously applies joint tape and the correct amount of joint compound for all drywall joints - dramatically improving taping efficiency. Model AT01-AD features stainless steel side plates plus a hard anodized push rod and cable drum to prevent corrosion and provide long life. The HAMMER has enclosed rollers on the control tube to provide the most comfortable grip and protect your hands from the pinching that can occur with other brands and the control tube flange provides a positive grip to cut the tape when extending for high ceilings. The smaller diameter of the new tube protector provides maximum comfort and requires no tools to remove for easy cleaning and cable replacement. Applies joint compound and joint tape to butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Applies joint compound and joint tape to internal corners on walls and ceilings

products.short_description: The Columbia Mud Roller is engineered to make applying large volumes of drywall compound fast, smooth, and efficient. Perfect for coating walls and ceilings, this high-capacity roller allows you to quickly load and release joint compound across broad surfaces—ideal when preparing taped seams for final finishing with...
products.description_text: The Columbia Mud Roller is engineered to make applying large volumes of drywall compound fast, smooth, and efficient. Perfect for coating walls and ceilings, this high-capacity roller allows you to quickly load and release joint compound across broad surfaces—ideal when preparing taped seams for final finishing with a skimming blade or trowel. Built for professional performance, the Columbia Mud Roller features a premium, high-density composite nap designed for maximum compound pickup and even distribution. This specialized roller delivers consistent coverage that speeds up the skimming process and reduces fatigue on the job. A durable ¼-inch steel shank provides rigidity during use, while the ergonomic handle offers a comfortable, secure grip for all-day productivity. Features High-Capacity Application – Designed to move large amounts of drywall compound quickly, saving hours on big jobs. Even Compound Release – Premium composite nap distributes mud smoothly for a uniform surface and easier finishing. Durable Construction – Heavy-duty ¼" steel shank resists bending, ensuring long-term professional performance. Ergonomic Grip – Comfortable, solvent-resistant handle made for daily use on busy jobsites. Pole-Compatible – Connects easily to standard drywall handles or extension poles for extended reach. Ideal Size – Perfect for coating taped seams and prepping large areas before skimming. Note: Handle not included.

Professional-Grade Nap – Designed for durability, consistent performance, and long service life. Efficient Surface Prep – Ideal for rolling compound on taped seams or large areas before skimming. Note: Replacement roller cover only. Handle and roller frame not included.

products.short_description: Columbia Tools is proud to launch all-new Knives with Comfort Grip Handles — expertly designed to make drywall finishing faster, cleaner, and easier than ever.
products.description_text: Columbia Tools is proud to launch all-new Knives with Comfort Grip Handles — expertly designed to make drywall finishing faster, cleaner, and easier than ever. Made for Precision Finishing These knives pair Columbia’s proven blade performance with a Comfort Grip handle engineered for all-day use. The blade features a refined arch and controlled taper to minimize wall interference, delivering smooth, precise results in tight spaces and demanding finishing applications. Features Tapered Edge for Clean Finishing Specially shaped blade tapers inward to reduce wall interference, delivering clean, controlled finishes in tight areas. Stainless Steel Blade Durable, corrosion-resistant stainless steel provides long-lasting performance and smooth compound flow. Flexible Blade Performance Optimized flex allows for even pressure and consistent results across a wide range of drywall finishing applications. Ergonomic Comfort Grip Handle Soft-touch, ergonomically contoured handle reduces fatigue and improves control during extended use. Built-In Hammer Head Integrated hammer head lets you quickly set screws without switching tools, saving time on the job. Full Tang Construction One-piece blade-to-handle design increases strength, balance, and durability for professional-grade reliability. Built with the job site in mind and engineered for precision, Columbia Knives with Comfort Grip Handles help you work faster, reduce touch-ups, and finish with confidence.

Made for Three-Ways These knives take everything you love about our Stainless Steel Nylon Handle Putty Knives—including the hammer head—and refine the blade shape specifically for three-way corners. products.product_name: Columbia 6ft Tall Boy Predator Automatic Taper
products.short_description: The 6ft Predator Carbon Fiber Taper is engineered for professionals who demand the best performance for higher ceilings.
products.description_text: The 6ft Predator Carbon Fiber Taper is engineered for professionals who demand the best performance for higher ceilings. Columbia is thrilled to announce the 6ft Tall Boy Predator Taper – the world’s first 6ft Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper, designed specifically for tackling high ceilings with ease and precision. If you're working on projects that require extra reach, this automatic taper is the tool you’ve been waiting for. Made from high quality carbon fiber The Tall Boy Predator Taper is lighter, stronger, and more innovative. Its carbon fiber construction is not only incredibly lightweight but also dent-proof, making it the perfect companion for any taping job, year after year. Whether you're working on flats or angles, the Tall Boy Predator Taper offers effortless performance on every project that requires a higher reach. Features 6ft length for reaching higher ceilings with ease Handmade from Carbon Fiber & steel components for lightweight strength Titanium pull rod for extra style and durability Pump Action cutting system with roller chain for smoother, more efficient cutting Reduced drag system for seamless cornering Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms & cable drum for corrosion resistance Quick release cap for easy cleaning Adjustable brake & quick release for fast tape changes

products.description_text: 10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (10FFB) (12FFB) New and improved “No Swell” gaskets. Rubber-gasketed bar system stays flexible, and rubber roller wheels provide soft ride, even when dirty. The moving axle allows better control. Springs not required! Our hinged door design allows for quick cleaning, and the ability to run with or without door springs. Use one spring, two springs or no springs at all! 7" Throttle Box (7CFB) Our durable billet aluminium cone is lightweight and designed to last a lifetime. Does not pit and rust through like other designs made from nickel plated mild steel. Specially angled to access tight corners, the billet aluminium cone dispenses the proper amount of drywall compound smoothly and evenly. Coupled with our billet aluminium corner finishers, our corner boxes are unbeatable. 3" Angle Head (3AH) We believe the Columbia Angle Head to be the best Corner Finisher that money can buy! Our Angle Heads finish angles quickly and professionally with the correct, consistent amount of joint compound and the proper feathering of edges. Precision machined billet aluminium head and durable stainless steel wings ensure longer wear and performance. Loading Pump and Box Filler (HMP) (BF) Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket. Matrix Box Handle (MH) The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you're used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life. Columbia One 3-5 ft. Extendible Handle (C1HEXT) The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nailspotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the one system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. With the exception of the flat boxes, this one handle is all you’ll need.
products.description_html:
10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (10FFB) (12FFB)

New and improved “No Swell” gaskets. Rubber-gasketed bar system stays flexible, and rubber roller wheels provide soft ride, even when dirty. The moving axle allows better control. Springs not required! Our hinged door design allows for quick cleaning, and the ability to run with or without door springs. Use one spring, two springs or no springs at all!

7" Throttle Box (7CFB)

Our durable billet aluminium cone is lightweight and designed to last a lifetime. Does not pit and rust through like other designs made from nickel plated mild steel. Specially angled to access tight corners, the billet aluminium cone dispenses the proper amount of drywall compound smoothly and evenly. Coupled with our billet aluminium corner finishers, our corner boxes are unbeatable.

3" Angle Head (3AH)

We believe the Columbia Angle Head to be the best Corner Finisher that money can buy! Our Angle Heads finish angles quickly and professionally with the correct, consistent amount of joint compound and the proper feathering of edges. Precision machined billet aluminium head and durable stainless steel wings ensure longer wear and performance.

Loading Pump and Box Filler (HMP) (BF)

Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket.

Matrix Box Handle (MH)

The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you're used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

Columbia One 3-5 ft. Extendible Handle (C1HEXT)

The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nailspotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the one system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. With the exception of the flat boxes, this one handle is all you’ll need.

By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joint...
products.description_text: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Flat Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Flat Box we make exceeds your expectations. products.short_description: Columbia is proud to offer you the finest Automatic Taper on the market. This precision engineered tool is designed to be the lightest, fastest and smoothest running taper on the market. Built with durable stainless steel and hard anodized aluminum parts, it offers many years of rugged use.
products.description_text: Columbia is proud to offer you the finest Automatic Taper on the market. This precision engineered tool is designed to be the lightest, fastest and smoothest running taper on the market. Built with durable stainless steel and hard anodized aluminum parts, it offers many years of rugged use. Features Knurl grip control tube allows for secure grip even when slipery. Handy pull ring on hand grip to let you cut tape with ease while taping high joints. Clutch release shaft and pulley wheel are split to reduce drag while creaser wheel is in use. Larger wheels on cutting system to make cutting much smoother. Removable Taper Cap Knurl Grip Control Sleeve with Finger-Grab Ring Adjustable Tape Spool Bands Adjustable Wheel Tension High-quaility billet aluminum maching High-quaility stainless steel components Purpose Simultaneously applies tape and joint compound to horizontal wall joints, ceiling and butt-joints, and internal angle joints.
products.description_html:
Columbia is proud to offer you the finest Automatic Taper on the market. This precision engineered tool is designed to be the lightest, fastest and smoothest running taper on the market. Built with durable stainless steel and hard anodized aluminum parts, it offers many years of rugged use.

Features

Knurl grip control tube allows for secure grip even when slipery. Handy pull ring on hand grip to let you cut tape with ease while taping high joints. Clutch release shaft and pulley wheel are split to reduce drag while creaser wheel is in use. Larger wheels on cutting system to make cutting much smoother.

  • Removable Taper Cap
  • Knurl Grip Control Sleeve with Finger-Grab Ring
  • Adjustable Tape Spool Bands
  • Adjustable Wheel Tension
  • High-quaility billet aluminum maching
  • High-quaility stainless steel components

    Purpose

    Simultaneously applies tape and joint compound to horizontal wall joints, ceiling and butt-joints, and internal angle joints.

products.short_description: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass.
products.description_text: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass. For a flawless finish and faster results, the Mud Roller from Columbia Tools is your go-to solution for any coating job. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

products.short_description: Columbia Tools is proud to launch our all-new One Piece Putty Knives – precision-crafted from stainless steel for strength, flexibility, and all-day comfort.
products.description_text: Columbia Tools is proud to launch our all-new One Piece Putty Knives – precision-crafted from stainless steel for strength, flexibility, and all-day comfort. Built to Last Engineered as a single piece of stainless steel with a welded full tang construction, these knives deliver unmatched durability while maintaining the flexibility finishers rely on. A sleek, comfortable grip ensures control and reduced fatigue, making these knives an essential addition to every finisher’s toolbox. Features One-Piece Stainless Steel Design: Welded full tang construction eliminates weak points for maximum strength and reliability. Flexible Stainless Steel Blade: Smooth, consistent application with just the right amount of flex for professional finishing. Comfortable Grip: Ergonomically shaped for control, balance, and reduced strain during extended use. Durable & Easy to Clean: Corrosion-resistant stainless steel provides long-lasting performance and easy maintenance. Designed for performance and built to withstand the demands of the job site, Columbia One Piece Putty Knives offer the perfect balance of strength, comfort, and precision finishing.

products.short_description: The Columbia Basic Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Set with Express Case is the perfect solution for professionals and DIY enthusiasts looking to streamline taping tasks. This set includes high-quality semi-automatic taping tools that helps you apply mud quickly and efficiently in corners, saving you time and effort.
products.description_text: The Columbia Basic Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Set with Express Case is the perfect solution for professionals and DIY enthusiasts looking to streamline taping tasks. This set includes high-quality semi-automatic taping tools that helps you apply mud quickly and efficiently in corners, saving you time and effort. The set also comes with an Express Case for convenient storage and transport of your taping tool. The case is durable and lightweight, making it easy to carry to and from job sites. With the Basic Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Set, you'll have everything you need to tackle your taping projects with ease. Features Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material. The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it. The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.

products.description_text: The Closet Monster Flat Box Handle is especially useful for boxing tight areas where a longer handle will not fit. At approximately 19 inches (50cm) in overall all length this short handle is a great option for closets, behind scaffolding, certain high work, etc. Like all of our Flat Box Handles, the Closet Monster also features our 180 grip head design. Since the handle is so short, a traditional brake just wasn't needed. We have included an adjustable wing-nut that allows you to fix the box at your desired angle.

products.short_description: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass.
products.description_text: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass. For a flawless finish and faster results, the Mud Roller from Columbia Tools is your go-to solution for any coating job. Key Features Increased Coating Capacity : Holds 20% to 50% more coating, reducing refills and boosting efficiency. Acme Thread : Works with any paint handle or any Columbia one handle with the Paint Handle Adapter (PHA). Perfect Flat Finish : Delivers smooth, even coverage with no smudging. Self-Refilling Design : Refills automatically from excess coating for continuous coverage. High-Resilience Fibers : Advanced polyamide fibers ensure uniform application and even release. Anti-Splash Technology : Minimizes splatter for a cleaner workspace. Easy to Clean : Low-maintenance with quick fiber cleaning. Versatile Application : Works with paste coatings, Airless machine coatings, and fluid powder coatings. Multiple Size Options : Available in sizes from 1.5” Corner Mud Roller, 3” Mud Roller and 9” Mud Roller.

products.short_description: Due to their lightweight design and ease of use, skimming blades are becoming an increasingly popular tool in the drywall finishing industry.
products.description_text: Due to their lightweight design and ease of use, skimming blades are becoming an increasingly popular tool in the drywall finishing industry. Columbia Composite-Body Skimming Blades come in a variety of lengths up to 48 inches and feature a flexible, high-precision 0.3mm stainless steel blade inserted into a rigid composite handle profile. These tools are exceptional for smoothing fresh drywall compound with even distribution and superior control. Why Choose Columbia Skimming Blades? Not all skimming blades are created equal. Columbia Skimming Blades offer professional finishers a unique combination of balance, precision, and performance features that set them apart. A Unique Blade Edge The true advantage of Columbia skimming blades lies in their high-precision 0.3mm European stainless steel inserts, designed to provide just the right amount of flex for efficient, effortless skimming and smoothing. While most blade edges are stamped flat with squared corners that can hinder mud flow, Columbia skimming blades feature a proprietary rounded edge profile that allows drywall compound to roll smoothly and evenly off the blade—delivering superior results with less effort. The raised, rounded blade corners also help eliminate lap marks, ensuring a consistent, streak-free finish when working over large areas. Replaceable Blade Inserts Skimming blades are precision tools and can be damaged on the job if dropped. Columbia’s innovative design allows for quick, tool-free blade insert replacement. Simply remove an end cap to slide out the damaged insert and replace it—saving you time and money by avoiding the need to replace the entire tool. Features 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16", 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″ Note: Handle not included.
products.description_html:
Due to their lightweight design and ease of use, skimming blades are becoming an increasingly popular tool in the drywall finishing industry.

Columbia Composite-Body Skimming Blades come in a variety of lengths up to 48 inches and feature a flexible, high-precision 0.3mm stainless steel blade inserted into a rigid composite handle profile. These tools are exceptional for smoothing fresh drywall compound with even distribution and superior control.

Why Choose Columbia Skimming Blades?

Not all skimming blades are created equal. Columbia Skimming Blades offer professional finishers a unique combination of balance, precision, and performance features that set them apart.

A Unique Blade Edge

The true advantage of Columbia skimming blades lies in their high-precision 0.3mm European stainless steel inserts, designed to provide just the right amount of flex for efficient, effortless skimming and smoothing.

While most blade edges are stamped flat with squared corners that can hinder mud flow, Columbia skimming blades feature a proprietary rounded edge profile that allows drywall compound to roll smoothly and evenly off the blade—delivering superior results with less effort.

The raised, rounded blade corners also help eliminate lap marks, ensuring a consistent, streak-free finish when working over large areas.

Replaceable Blade Inserts

Skimming blades are precision tools and can be damaged on the job if dropped. Columbia’s innovative design allows for quick, tool-free blade insert replacement. Simply remove an end cap to slide out the damaged insert and replace it—saving you time and money by avoiding the need to replace the entire tool.

Features

  • 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16", 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″

Note: Handle not included.

The most popular handle size for both Columbia skimming blades and compound rollers is t...
products.description_text: Manufactured with high-quality fiberglass, aluminum, and high-impact ABS composite, Columbia Skimming Blade and Compound Roller Extendable Handles offer lightweight handling while maintaining exceptional rigidity and durability. The most popular handle size for both Columbia skimming blades and compound rollers is the medium (4' - 6') handle, as it provides excellent versatility for a wide range of wall and ceiling finishing applications. The long (5' - 8') extendable handle is ideal for added comfort and extended reach when working on higher ceilings and elevated wall areas. When using a skimming blade, an adapter is required. Columbia offers two adapter options depending on whether you are using an aluminum-body or composite-body skimming blade. A compound roller, however, attaches directly to the handle without the need for an adapter. Features Available in two adjustable sizes: 4' - 6' and 5' - 8' Unique snap-in attachment that prevents rotation under pressure Constructed with fiberglass and aluminum—lightweight, yet more rigid and durable than competitive handles Comfortable rubberized end grip Adapter sold separately. Skimming blade sold separately.

products.product_name: Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool and Sanding Set with Bonus Hand Tool Set
products.short_description: The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape...
products.description_text: The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape using a wet-tape system with the Semi-Automatic Taper. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing the second coat of drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner flushers help to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. Finally, use the best sanding head on the market to sand dried coats. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools. Features Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material. The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it. Includes all the tools needed for each step of the taping process in one handy kit. The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.
products.description_html:
The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape using a wet-tape system with the Semi-Automatic Taper. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing the second coat of drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner flushers help to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. Finally, use the best sanding head on the market to sand dried coats. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools.

Features

  • Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material.
  • The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it.
  • Includes all the tools needed for each step of the taping process in one handy kit.
  • The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.

products.catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Automatic Taping Tools
products.product_name: Columbia Full Taping Set with Carbon Fiber Taper with Bonus Hand Tool Set
products.short_description: Predator Automatic Taper (PTAPER)
products.description_text: Predator Automatic Taper (PTAPER) The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you. Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components Titanium pull rod Adjustable Brake Quick release for tape changing Zero Drag system for corners Knurled sleeve with pull ring Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum 10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (10FFB) (12FFB) New and improved “No Swell” gaskets. Rubber-gasketed bar system stays flexible, and rubber roller wheels provide soft ride, even when dirty. The moving axle allows better control. Springs not required! Our hinged door design allows for quick cleaning, and the ability to run with or without door springs. Use one spring, two springs or no springs at all! 7" Throttle Box (7CFB) Our durable billet aluminium cone is lightweight and designed to last a lifetime. Does not pit and rust through like other designs made from nickel plated mild steel. Specially angled to access tight corners, the billet aluminium cone dispenses the proper amount of drywall compound smoothly and evenly. Coupled with our billet aluminium corner finishers, our corner boxes are unbeatable. 3" Angle Head (3AH) We believe the Columbia Angle Head to be the best Corner Finisher that money can buy! Our Angle Heads finish angles quickly and professionally with the correct, consistent amount of joint compound and the proper feathering of edges. Precision machined billet aluminium head and durable stainless steel wings ensure longer wear and performance. Loading Pump and Box Filler (HMP) (BF) Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket. Matrix Box Handle (MH) The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you're used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life. Columbia One 3-5 ft. Extendible Handle (C1HEXT) The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nailspotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the one system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. With the exception of the flat boxes, this one handle is all you’ll need.
products.description_html:
Predator Automatic Taper (PTAPER)

The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

  • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
  • Titanium pull rod
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Zero Drag system for corners
  • Knurled sleeve with pull ring
  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum

10" and 12" Flat Finishing Boxes (10FFB) (12FFB)

New and improved “No Swell” gaskets. Rubber-gasketed bar system stays flexible, and rubber roller wheels provide soft ride, even when dirty. The moving axle allows better control. Springs not required! Our hinged door design allows for quick cleaning, and the ability to run with or without door springs. Use one spring, two springs or no springs at all!

7" Throttle Box (7CFB)

Our durable billet aluminium cone is lightweight and designed to last a lifetime. Does not pit and rust through like other designs made from nickel plated mild steel. Specially angled to access tight corners, the billet aluminium cone dispenses the proper amount of drywall compound smoothly and evenly. Coupled with our billet aluminium corner finishers, our corner boxes are unbeatable.

3" Angle Head (3AH)

We believe the Columbia Angle Head to be the best Corner Finisher that money can buy! Our Angle Heads finish angles quickly and professionally with the correct, consistent amount of joint compound and the proper feathering of edges. Precision machined billet aluminium head and durable stainless steel wings ensure longer wear and performance.

Loading Pump and Box Filler (HMP) (BF)

Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket.

Matrix Box Handle (MH)

The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you're used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

Columbia One 3-5 ft. Extendible Handle (C1HEXT)

The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nailspotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the one system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. With the exception of the flat boxes, this one handle is all you’ll need.
features: Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
Titanium pull rod
Adjustable Brake
Quick release for tape changing
Zero Drag system for corners
Knurled sleeve with pull ring
Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum

products.product_name: Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set
products.short_description: The Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set is the ideal all-in-one solution for professionals who need speed, consistency, and precision when applying and finishing compounds. Designed for efficiency on the jobsite, this kit combines Columbia’s trusted tools to help you spread, smooth, and finish coatings with mini...
products.description_text: The Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set is the ideal all-in-one solution for professionals who need speed, consistency, and precision when applying and finishing compounds. Designed for efficiency on the jobsite, this kit combines Columbia’s trusted tools to help you spread, smooth, and finish coatings with minimal effort and maximum control. The mud roller ensures fast and even compound application across large surfaces, while the included putty knives and finishing tools provide the accuracy needed for detailed work and clean edges. Each component is built with durability and comfort in mind, allowing professionals to work longer with consistent results. Whether you're applying compound, smoothing surfaces, or completing detailed finishing work, the Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set delivers the performance and reliability professionals expect from Columbia Tools.
products.description_html:
The Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set is the ideal all-in-one solution for professionals who need speed, consistency, and precision when applying and finishing compounds. Designed for efficiency on the jobsite, this kit combines Columbia’s trusted tools to help you spread, smooth, and finish coatings with minimal effort and maximum control.

The mud roller ensures fast and even compound application across large surfaces, while the included putty knives and finishing tools provide the accuracy needed for detailed work and clean edges. Each component is built with durability and comfort in mind, allowing professionals to work longer with consistent results.

Whether you're applying compound, smoothing surfaces, or completing detailed finishing work, the Columbia Mud Roller and Putty Knife Set delivers the performance and reliability professionals expect from Columbia Tools.

products.short_description: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass.
products.description_text: The Mud Roller from Columbia Tools – the ultimate solution for fast, smooth, and efficient coating applications. Designed for professionals, this innovative mud roller ensures consistent coating thickness and minimal effort for every pass. For a flawless finish and faster results, the Mud Roller from Columbia Tools is your go-to solution for any coating job. Key Features Increased Coating Capacity : Holds 20% to 50% more coating, reducing refills and boosting efficiency. Perfect Flat Finish : Delivers smooth, even coverage with no smudging. Self-Refilling Design : Refills automatically from excess coating for continuous coverage. High-Resilience Fibers : Advanced polyamide fibers ensure uniform application and even release. Anti-Splash Technology : Minimizes splatter for a cleaner workspace. Easy to Clean : Low-maintenance with quick fiber cleaning. Versatile Application : Works with paste coatings, Airless machine coatings, and fluid powder coatings. Multiple Size Options : Available in sizes from 1.5” Corner Mud Roller, 3” Mud Roller and 9” Mud Roller.

products.short_description: Columbia Tools is proud to launch all-new One Piece Putty Knives – precision-crafted from stainless steel for strength, flexibility, and all-day comfort.
products.description_text: Columbia Tools is proud to launch all-new One Piece Putty Knives – precision-crafted from stainless steel for strength, flexibility, and all-day comfort. Built to Last Engineered as a single piece of stainless steel with a welded full tang construction, these knives deliver unmatched durability while maintaining the flexibility finishers rely on. A sleek, comfortable grip ensures control and reduced fatigue, making these knives an essential addition to every finisher’s toolbox. Features One-Piece Stainless Steel Design: Welded full tang construction eliminates weak points for maximum strength and reliability. Flexible Stainless Steel Blade: Smooth, consistent application with just the right amount of flex for professional finishing. Comfortable Grip: Ergonomically shaped for control, balance, and reduced strain during extended use. Durable & Easy to Clean: Corrosion-resistant stainless steel provides long-lasting performance and easy maintenance. Designed for performance and built to withstand the demands of the job site, Columbia One Piece Putty Knives offer the perfect balance of strength, comfort, and precision finishing.

products.short_description: The Predator – Now with Removable Taper Head
products.description_text: The Predator – Now with Removable Taper Head The Predator continues to redefine what a taper can be — the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper just got even better. Built on 38 years of precision craftsmanship, the Columbia Predator now features a new removable taper head, making maintenance and cleaning easier than ever before. This innovation, combined with its ultra-lightweight carbon fiber body, makes the Predator not only dent-proof but also significantly lighter than any other taper on the market. Designed for performance and endurance, it glides effortlessly through flats and angles, year after year. From reduced drag in corners to our new quick-release removable head, this tool is engineered to keep you taping — not tinkering. Stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms provide a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The six-wheel cutting sleeve ensures smooth travel and superb grip, while the pull ring helps tackle high ceilings with ease. The Predator maintains a stable temperature and remains warm to the touch, no matter the conditions. Every taper includes an adjustable brake and quick-release system for fast tape changes. The Titanium pull rod adds strength, precision, and style — the kind of refinement professionals appreciate in every pull. If you’re serious about finishing and demand a taper that feels as good as it performs, the new Predator with Removable Head is built for you. products.description_html:
The Predator – Now with Removable Taper Head

The Predator continues to redefine what a taper can be — the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper just got even better. Built on 38 years of precision craftsmanship, the Columbia Predator now features a new removable taper head, making maintenance and cleaning easier than ever before.

This innovation, combined with its ultra-lightweight carbon fiber body, makes the Predator not only dent-proof but also significantly lighter than any other taper on the market. Designed for performance and endurance, it glides effortlessly through flats and angles, year after year.

From reduced drag in corners to our new quick-release removable head, this tool is engineered to keep you taping — not tinkering. Stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms provide a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The six-wheel cutting sleeve ensures smooth travel and superb grip, while the pull ring helps tackle high ceilings with ease.

The Predator maintains a stable temperature and remains warm to the touch, no matter the conditions. Every taper includes an adjustable brake and quick-release system for fast tape changes. The Titanium pull rod adds strength, precision, and style — the kind of refinement professionals appreciate in every pull.

If you’re serious about finishing and demand a taper that feels as good as it performs, the new Predator with Removable Head is built for you.

Its ultra-lightweight, dent-proof carbon fiber shell provides exceptional control, reduced fatigue, and a warm-to-the-touch feel — all in a shorter, more maneuverable package. Designed for precision work where space is limited, the Sawed Off Predator Body glides smoothly through corners, closets, stairwells, and low-height areas. The knurled grip zone adds comfort and control for all-day use. products.product_name: Columbia PowerFill 3.5 Pro Series Cordless Loading Pump
products.short_description: Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the...
products.description_text: Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button. Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill. * Bucket not included. Features SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level. One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries. Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning. Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips. Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes. Powerstroke Pump 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability. Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling. Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter. ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning. Powered by DEWALT® Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use. Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers. Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable. Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes.
products.description_html:
Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

* Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes.

products.short_description: The Predator (PTAPER)
products.description_text: The Predator (PTAPER) The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you. Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components Titanium pull rod Adjustable Brake Quick release for tape changing Zero Drag system for corners Knurled sleeve with pull ring Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum Hot Mud Pump (HMP) Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket. Stainless Steel Box Filler and Gooseneck sold separately. Billet anodized leg is sturdy, well balanced, and easier to clean 20 degree angled handles provides enhanced leverage resulting is less back strain and easier pumping. Increased Gooseneck diameter for faster filling, and solif billet tip for lifetime usage Gooseneck has soft-grip “taper-saver” on tube rack to increase life of Automatic Taper tube Billet Aluminium link on Mud Pump will not wear or crack like competitors cast aluminium parts Pumps feature soft grip handle and billet aluminium ball end for comfort. Box Filler (BF) Gooseneck (GN)

The Predator (PTAPER)

The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance.   • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components

  • Adjustable Brake

  • Zero Drag system for corners

Hot Mud Pump (HMP)

Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) All Mud Pumps are available in Canadian versions which offer a longer tube length allowing for use in “Canadian Style” pails. Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. They’re fabricated with an anodized aluminum cylinder, durable stainless steel shaft, a precision machined cast aluminum head, and a tough, smooth solid aluminum leg. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket. Stainless Steel Box Filler and Gooseneck sold separately.

  • Billet anodized leg is sturdy, well balanced, and easier to clean
  • 20 degree angled handles provides enhanced leverage resulting is less back strain and easier pumping.
  • Increased Gooseneck diameter for faster filling, and solif billet tip for lifetime usage
  • Gooseneck has soft-grip “taper-saver” on tube rack to increase life of Automatic Taper tube
  • Billet Aluminium link on Mud Pump will not wear or crack like competitors cast aluminium parts
  • Pumps feature soft grip handle and billet aluminium ball end for comfort.

products.product_name: Columbia Predator Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool and Sanding Set with Bonus Hand Tool Set
products.short_description: The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape...
products.description_text: The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape using a wet-tape system with the Semi-Automatic Taper. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing the second coat of drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner flushers help to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. Finally, use the best sanding head on the market to sand dried coats. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools. Features Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material. The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it. Includes all the tools needed for each step of the taping process in one handy kit. The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.
products.description_html:
The Columbia Full Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. Apply the tape using a wet-tape system with the Semi-Automatic Taper. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing the second coat of drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner flushers help to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. Finally, use the best sanding head on the market to sand dried coats. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools.

Features

  • Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material.

products.short_description: Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a...
products.description_text: Cleaning a Pump doesn’t get any easier than this! Columbia Predator Quick-Clean Mud Pumps feature quick-release clamps on head that allow for easy removal of the pump tube from the head. This allows for easy and quick cleaning of the entire unit, and is especially useful when using fast setting joint compound (a.k.a Hot Mud.) Our Pumps are built to exacting air-tight standards making them the easiest to pump and prime. Whether you are using quick-set mud or any other type of joint compound, we have the pump for your bucket. Box Filler and Gooseneck sold separately. Sturdy, Well Balanced, and Easy to Clean 20 degree angled handles provides enhanced leverage resulting is less back strain and easier pumping. Increased Gooseneck diameter for faster filling Gooseneck has soft-grip “taper-saver” on tube rack to increase life of Automatic Taper tube Pumps feature soft grip handle and billet aluminium ball end for comfort Purpose This tool lives in your mud bucket and loads Columbia Tools with joint compound. Our Mud Pumps love mud! Carbon Fiber Handmade from Carbon Fiber Significantly lighter Dent proof/high stiffness and strength Stable temperature and remains warm to the touch Additional grip compared to aluminum

products.product_name: Columbia Predator Semi-Automatic Taping Tool Set with Bonus Hand Tool Set
products.short_description: The Columbia Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. The corner and flat compo...
products.description_text: The Columbia Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The final touch is using the corner flusher to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools. Features Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material. The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it. Includes all the tools needed for each step of the taping process in one handy kit. The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.
products.description_html:
The Columbia Semi-Auto Taping Tool Kit can significantly increase your taping and finishing production capabilities when compared to hand taping. Semi-Auto taping tools greatly increase efficiency and consistency compared to hand taping and decrease waste, resulting in reduced material use. The corner and flat compound applicators can be attached to the Columbia Compound Tube, allowing drywall mud compound to be easily and evenly applied to flat seams and corner angles. The corner roller is then used to bed tape squarely and securely into inside drywall angles. The final touch is using the corner flusher to apply an equal, feathered finish to inside corners. The entire kit fits in the included convenient, custom-crafted tool carrying case, for easy transportation, storage and protection of your tools.

Features

  • Increase your efficiency on the job compared to working with hand tools and waste less material.
  • The included compound tube allows you to evenly apply compound where you need it.
  • Includes all the tools needed for each step of the taping process in one handy kit.
  • The included case gives your tools the protection they need and make it easier to transport to the job.
