products.description_text: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Features Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.

The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (35TT or 50TT)...
products.description_text: TapeTech Corner Finishers The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (35TT or 50TT) or the 14TT MudRunner to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings Features Stainless Steel Frames Patented, positive Ball Retainer EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finishers The TapeTech EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Features Longer wear and superior performance Commercial Grade Stainless Steel Frames Patented, positive Ball Retainer EasyRoll Wheels Adjustable Springs
products.description_html:
TapeTech Corner Finishers

The TapeTech Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers, are attached to a corner applicator (35TT or 50TT) or the 14TT MudRunner to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. TapeTech Corner Finishers are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners.

  • Wipes down excess mud in internal corners
  • Embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings
  • Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings

Features

  • Stainless Steel Frames
  • Patented, positive Ball Retainer

EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finishers

The TapeTech EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll™ Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included.

Features

  • Longer wear and superior performance
  • Commercial Grade
  • Stainless Steel Frames
  • Patented, positive Ball Retainer
  • EasyRoll Wheels
  • Adjustable Springs

products.description_text: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs. The Corner Flushers fit all TapeTech corner tools (Compound Tubes, XHTT and FHTT handles, CA07TT and CA08TT Corner Applicators and 14TT MudRunner®). Features Stainless Steel Body Designed To Easily Add Rollers Ultra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene Skids for smooth operation and long life

products.product_name: TapeTech EasyClean Finishing Box w/ EasyRoll Wheels
products.short_description: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The EasyClean Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount...
products.description_text: The TapeTech EasyClean® Finishing Box automatically dispenses the proper amount of joint compound and feathers the edges of butt joints and flat joints in one pass. The EasyClean Finishing Box helps produce professional results every time. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first finishing application to the second or third application. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the drywall or sheetrock on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. The new EasyRoll™ wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll™ wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. EasyRoll™ wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll wheels is more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep, the finishing box on the corner bead. And EasyRoll™ wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. EasyRoll™ wheels do not affect how the finishing box runs on standard flat joints. All TapeTech finishing boxes now feature EasyRoll™ wheels for finishing outside corner bead. Applies first coat of joint compound to embed tape at butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Finishes butt joints and flat joints on walls and ceilings Feathers edges of butt joints and flat joints Features Anodized Aluminum Box Adjustable Crown Control Solid Brass Blade Holder Hardened Steel Blade Pivoting Axle

EasyRoll™ wheels do not affect how the finishing box runs on standard flat joints. All TapeTech finishing boxes now feature EasyRoll™ wheels for finishing outside corner bead.

products.short_description: The TapeTech EasyClean Nail Spotter is used to fill the depressions left from the nails or screw heads during installation of the drywall. The Nail Spotter features an easy clean box design that removes excess compound at the same time as filling the depressions. The hardened steel skid plate allows the Nail Spotter...
products.description_text: The TapeTech EasyClean Nail Spotter is used to fill the depressions left from the nails or screw heads during installation of the drywall. The Nail Spotter features an easy clean box design that removes excess compound at the same time as filling the depressions. The hardened steel skid plate allows the Nail Spotter to move along the wall smoothly while protecting the stainless steel blade from nail or screw heads that were not fully set below the surface of the drywall. The HN fibreglass handle is available separately. products.catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Taping Tools
products.short_description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model...
products.description_text: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the new handles to the corner finishers. And the new, optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. For any corner finishers or corner flushers, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CFA-TT Adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.

  • If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter.
  • If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.

products.short_description: Finally! A support handle to allow professional finishers to use ATF tools in closets and other tight spaces. For more than 80 years, even dedicated ATF tool users have been forced to finish closets with traditional hand tools. But the new TapeTech Closet Crusher – model FHTT-CC – makes it possible to use corner rol...
products.description_text: Finally! A support handle to allow professional finishers to use ATF tools in closets and other tight spaces. For more than 80 years, even dedicated ATF tool users have been forced to finish closets with traditional hand tools. But the new TapeTech Closet Crusher – model FHTT-CC – makes it possible to use corner rollers, corner applicators and corner finishers in the tightest spaces. Note: Corner roller, Corner Applicator, Corner Finisher/Flusher not included!
products.description_html:
Finally! A support handle to allow professional finishers to use ATF tools in closets and other tight spaces. For more than 80 years, even dedicated ATF tool users have been forced to finish closets with traditional hand tools. But the new TapeTech Closet Crusher – model FHTT-CC – makes it possible to use corner rollers, corner applicators and corner finishers in the tightest spaces.

Note: Corner roller, Corner Applicator, Corner Finisher/Flusher not included!

products.product_name: TapeTech Gold Stainless Steel FLEXX Finishing Trowel
products.short_description: Discover the precision and durability of the TapeTech Premium Gold Finishing Trowel, engineered for professional drywall finishers who demand top-tier performance and quality. Built with FLEXX technology, this trowel offers unparalleled flexibility and strength, ensuring a smooth, flawless finish on various surfaces...
products.description_text: Discover the precision and durability of the TapeTech Premium Gold Finishing Trowel, engineered for professional drywall finishers who demand top-tier performance and quality. Built with FLEXX technology, this trowel offers unparalleled flexibility and strength, ensuring a smooth, flawless finish on various surfaces. Whether you’re working with drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, or masonry, this versatile tool is designed to meet all your needs. Key Features FLEXX Technology for Unmatched Flexibility Options: Choose the desired size and flexibility combination to gain optimal control while maintaining durability, helping you achieve a flawless finish every time. Durable Construction: Built for long-term use, the TapeTech Premium Gold Finishing Trowel is constructed to withstand demanding tasks, ensuring reliable performance job after job. Ergonomic Handle Design: Reduce hand fatigue with the ergonomic handle, allowing for extended use during large or detailed projects without discomfort. Versatile for Various Applications: Whether it’s drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, or masonry, this trowel is versatile enough to handle a wide range of materials and surfaces. Usage and Applications The TapeTech Premium Gold Finishing Trowel is a professional-grade tool perfect for achieving smooth, even finishes on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, masonry, and concrete. Its flexible yet durable design allows it to handle a variety of tasks, from large wall surfaces to intricate detail work. Whether you are a seasoned contractor or a professional finisher, this trowel will deliver reliable results, helping you achieve a flawless finish every time.

products.description_text: Introducing the first high capacity finishing boxes designed to hold the right amount of joint compound when you really need it – on the first or second coat when you’re filling the joint – without the unnecessary weight when you don’t need it – on the finish coat. The NEW TapeTech MAXXBOX® Finishing Boxes are designed with the optimum capacity to weight ratio. This means that you get more “usable” joint compound – the amount that you can actually get out of the finishing box and onto the wall – when you actually need it, like on the first coat. The TapeTech MAXXBOX® finishing box delivers 94% more usable joint compound than the standard EasyClean® finishing box (model EZ07TT) and up to 68% more usable capacity than competitive high capacity finishing boxes. Step up to the boxes designed to hold and deliver the right amount. Every time. Every box. MAXXBOX®. The new EasyRoll® wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll® wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. EasyRoll® wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll® wheels is more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep, the finishing box on the corner bead. And EasyRoll® wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. EasyRoll® wheels do not affect how the finishing box runs on standard flat joints. All TapeTech finishing boxes now feature EasyRoll® wheels for finishing outside corner bead. products.description_text: The improved second generation MudRunner® Pro tool now applies joint compound to both inside and outside corners more quickly and accurately with minimal effort. The easy-to-use twist on/off handle offers precise control, while a 20% stronger piston allows for faster application of joint compound. The adjustable length handle, complete with set screws, allows for perfect positioning. Additionally, this new tool is 15% lighter than the original MudRunner®, making it easier to use for extended periods of time. Applies compound to external corners for paper faced bead application (with 16TT) Applies compound to inside corner for tape application (with 16TT90) Finishes internal corners (with corner finishers) Features Weighing in at 15% lighter than its predecessor, the new MudRunner® is easier to handle and maneuver. The twist on/off handle makes controlling the MudRunner® a breeze. With a 20% stronger piston, this tool delivers joint compound faster than ever before. The adjustable length handle, complete with set screws, allows for perfect positioning every time.

products.description_text: The new MudRunner® Pro Extension allows the user to add 12″ length to the MR01TT to reach higher spaces. The MRX01TT simply attaches by inserting the extrusion piece into the receiving port on the MR01TT and securing the clamps. The MRX01TT also has a receiving port to add multiple extensions. The New MudRunner® Pro Extension adds up to 20% more overall length to the MudRunner® Pro when installed. Due to the installment process, the extension becomes the “on/off” twisting lever for the tool.

products.description_text: The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and equipment on the jobsite, especially when water supplies are limited. Working from just a 5-gallon bucket of water, the MWS01-TT generates the ideal water pressure to effectively clean drywall finishing tools, paint brushes, rollers, pans and more! And the MWS01-TT helps finishers and painters comply with environmental laws by providing a convenient, professional wash station that does not wash the joint compound or paint into the soil. The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Cleans Drywall Finishing Tools Cleans Latex Paint from Painting Equipment Cleans Other Tools Perfect for Camp Sites or Remote Locations Weighs Just 34 Pounds! Tools not included.

products.short_description: Introducing the new Power Assist® MAXXBOX® finishing boxes from TapeTech®. Now you can have the extra capacity you want with half the effort required from other high capacity finishing boxes. Featuring the same smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application, the Power Assist® MAXXBOX® is sure to be...
products.description_text: Introducing the new Power Assist® MAXXBOX® finishing boxes from TapeTech®. Now you can have the extra capacity you want with half the effort required from other high capacity finishing boxes. Featuring the same smart design that matches the usable capacity to the application, the Power Assist® MAXXBOX® is sure to become the industry standard for finishing! These boxes work with all TapeTech finishing handles, including the 8000TT-PA Wizard® handle for Power Assist® boxes. With a usable joint compound capacity that varies by less than 10% across the range, the TapeTech Power Assist® finishing boxes hold the right amount of joint compound to keep you on the wall longer without wearing you out. The Power Assist® series features TapeTech’s famous EasyClean® design. The adjustable crown setting dial allows the user to easily adjust the amount of joint compound applied over the tape on the drywall joint. This is very helpful when progressing from the first embedding application to the second or third finishing coat. The pivoting axle helps to compensate when the drywall or sheetrock on one side of the joint is higher than the other side of the joint. The new EasyRoll® wheel system allows you to expertly finish all types of outside corner bead up to two times faster than finishing by hand. EasyRoll® wheels work with all types of outside corner bead including metal, paper-faced, vinyl and bullnose. EasyRoll® wheels provide a shoulder to guide the finishing box along the corner bead without after-market attachments or damage to the axle. The shoulder of the EasyRoll® wheels is more than three times wider than after-market products, making it easier to place, and keep, the finishing box on the corner bead. And EasyRoll® wheels are engineered and designed to be perfectly aligned with the finishing blade, eliminating the need to tilt the finishing box like you must with common after-market wheel systems. EasyRoll® wheels do not affect how the finishing box runs on standard flat joints. All TapeTech finishing boxes now feature EasyRoll® wheels for finishing outside corner bead. products.product_name: TapeTech Premium Blue Steel Taping Knife
products.short_description: TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound.
products.description_text: TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s oversized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel while Stainless Steel blades maximize rust resistance. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. Features: Premium Carbon Steel Blade Provides Precise Feathering and Smoothing Precision Grind Provides Perfect Flex and Finish Oversized, Tapered, Soft-Grip Handle Provides Optimal Control and Comfort Alloy Metal Hammer End Sets Protruding Fasteners, Adjusts Installation Flaws and Protects Against Damage From Drops. products.product_name: TapeTech Premium Drywall Compound Roller (Cover Only)
products.short_description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowe...
products.description_text: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Features Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames (sold separately). Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle (sold separately). With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.
products.description_html:
TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish.

Features

  • Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life.
  • Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers.
  • Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load.
  • Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames (sold separately). Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market.
  • Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle (sold separately). With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job.
  • Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

products.short_description: TapeTech premium knives are the Gold Standard for premium wipe-down and finishing knives. products.description_text: TapeTech premium knives are the Gold Standard for premium wipe-down and finishing knives. Featuring advanced engineering and the highest grade INOX German stainless steel, TapeTech knives produce the absolute best finish in the industry. The secret is the strong but flexible INOX blade and the precise fulcrum point designed into the grip area. This allows the blade to have up to ten times more contact area with the surface, generating a superior finish. The ergonomic design is comfortable even with extended use and significantly reduces the wrist strain that is common when using traditional finishing knives. The knives are easy to use with one hand or two.

products.description_text: Discover the precision and durability of the TapeTech Premium Gold Finishing Trowel, engineered for professional drywall finishers who demand top-tier performance and quality. Built with MAXFLEXX technology, this trowel offers unparalleled flexibility and strength, ensuring a smooth, flawless finish on various surfaces. Whether you’re working with drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, or masonry, this versatile tool is designed to meet all your needs. Trowel Features MAXFLEXX Technology helping you achieve a flawless finish every time. Durable Construction: Built for long-term use, the TapeTech Premium Gold MAXFLEXX Finishing Trowel is constructed to withstand demanding tasks, ensuring reliable performance job after job. Ergonomic Handle Design: Reduce hand fatigue with the ergonomic handle, allowing for extended use during large or detailed projects without discomfort. Versatile for Various Applications: Whether it’s drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, or masonry, this trowel is versatile enough to handle a wide range of materials and surfaces. Hawk Features Professional Grade ultra-light aluminum Hawk with 1.75mm tray features milled grooves to prevent slippage of compound, plaster, EIFS material or stucco. Rubber cushion under tray provides comfort and prevents abrasions. Features the ergonomic TapeTech ProSoft grip for all-day comfort and reduced fatigue.

products.description_text: TapeTech Premium Taping and Jointing Knives feature the optimal combination of design, materials experience and testing to produce knives with the best balance, flex, comfort, and control so you achieve premium results when applying and smoothing joint compound. The handle’s over-sized, tapered shape provides the most ergonomic, slip-resistant grip. The enlarged, alloy hammer end allows it to be used to set protruding fasteners, adjust installation flaws, and protect against damage if the knife is dropped. TapeTech Premium Taping and Joint Knife blades are precision ground and polished to provide the perfect amount of flex and finish. The Carbon Steel and Blue Steel blades provide ultimate feel. TapeTech Premium Taping Knives feature the strongest backing plate in the industry, preventing unwanted blade deflection while providing smooth, consistent control and finish. products.product_name: TapeTech QuickBox™ QSX Finishing Box (Fast Set Compound)
products.short_description: 6.5" QuickBox® QSX QB06-QSX
products.description_text: 6.5" QuickBox® QSX QB06-QSX The new QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound! 8.5" QuickBox® QSX QB08-QSX The TapeTech 22 cm QuickBox® features double the capacity of the original QB06-QSX. Using fast-setting joint compound to cover the joint tape has never been easier or more worry-free. The QuickBox® is the first and only finishing box designed specifically for use with fast-setting joint compound. The streamlined design of the QuickBox® allows for easy cleaning – there are no small areas for compound to hide! And even if you allow the fast-setting compound to dry, a couple of taps on the box and the compound falls out. The tool-less blade change system is patented and allows for quick replacement or profile changes.
products.description_html:
6.5" QuickBox® QSX

The new QuickBox® QSX from TapeTech is the first finishing box specifically designed to be used with fast-setting joint compounds. The 6 ½” QuickBox® QSX is the perfect tool for contractors who use fast-setting joint compound for the first coat over the paper or fiberglass joint tape. Constructed from advanced space age materials, fast-setting joint compound is easily removed from the finishing box, even hours or days later. The compound literally falls out of the QuickBox® QSX with a few light taps. The glass-filled polypropylene shell provides a slick surface with maximum strength and durability. The optimized blade design matches the blade with the application, eliminating the need to make adjustments or change crown settings. And it takes just a few seconds to change the long-lasting blades. QuickBox® QSX works with all finishing box handles, including the Wizard®. Now you can combine the speed and consistency of finishing boxes with the speed of fast-setting joint compound!

8.5" QuickBox® QSX
QB08-QSX

The TapeTech 22 cm QuickBox® features double the capacity of the original QB06-QSX. Using fast-setting joint compound to cover the joint tape has never been easier or more worry-free. The QuickBox® is the first and only finishing box designed specifically for use with fast-setting joint compound. The streamlined design of the QuickBox® allows for easy cleaning – there are no small areas for compound to hide! And even if you allow the fast-setting compound to dry, a couple of taps on the box and the compound falls out. The tool-less blade change system is patented and allows for quick replacement or profile changes.

products.description_text: The TapeTech Tool Caddy make filling finishing boxes with a compound tube even easier. It conveniently holds any length compound tube and filler adapter, preventing the need to place the tool on the floor or in the bucket of joint compound between fills. The Tool Caddy is light weight, durable, and securely holds any size finishing box in the perfect filling position. The Tool Caddy prevents joint compound from leaking and can be adjusted to fit almost any bucket height. The Caddy also provides a safe place to rest finishing boxes when not in use. A perfect accessory for any finisher. Use With Compound Tube When Filling Flat Boxes Durable Adjustable Design Holds Any Size Finishing Box Holds Any Length Compound Tube Fits Almost Any Bucket Height

products.description_text: Wizard® Compact Finishing Box Handle - 8000TT The new model 8000TT Wizard® handle from TapeTech provides unmatched control, maximum access and eliminates the learning curve of using traditional finishing box brake handles. The Wizard is the only finishing box handle that places your hand directly over the pressure plate, reducing the effort required while providing superior control. The Wizard fits into the smallest closets or under stairs and is much safer for workers on scaffolding compared to using a finishing box handle of any other length. The Wizard isn’t limited to just tight spaces or scaffolds. The Wizard is the absolute fastest and easiest way to finish any joints, especially horizontal joints. The innovative design, including the ability to reverse the front handle, allows for multiple ergonomic hand positions to reduce worker fatigue and increase productivity. Every drywall finisher needs the Wizard in their toolbox! products.catalog_category: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Taping Tools
products.short_description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model...
products.description_text: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the new handles to the corner finishers. And the new, optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the new handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter. The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. For any corner finishers or corner flushers, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CFA-TT Adapter. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter
